name: TruSTAR
description: This App integrates with TruSTAR to provide various hunting and reporting actions

actions.name: Hunt Ioc
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with an IOC

parameters.name: ioc
parameters.description: IOC to hunt

actions.name: Hunt Ip
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with an IP/CIDR

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP/CIDR to hunt

actions.name: Hunt Url
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with a URL

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: URL to hunt

actions.name: Hunt File
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with a file

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: File to hunt

actions.name: Hunt Email
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with an email address

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address to hunt

actions.name: Hunt Cve
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with a CVE (Common Vulnerability and Exposure) number

parameters.name: cve_number
parameters.description: CVE (Common Vulnerability and Exposure) number to hunt

actions.name: Hunt Malware
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with a malware indicator

parameters.name: malware
parameters.description: Malware to hunt

actions.name: Hunt Registry Key
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with a registry key

parameters.name: registry_key
parameters.description: Registry key to hunt

actions.name: Hunt Bitcoin Address
actions.description: Get report IDs associated with a bitcoin address

parameters.name: bitcoin_address
parameters.description: Bitcoin address to hunt

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Get report details

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: Report ID

parameters.name: id_type
parameters.description: ID type (Default: internal)

actions.name: Copy Report
actions.description: Copy a report to another enclave

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: Report ID

parameters.name: destination_enclave
parameters.description: ID of destination enclave

actions.name: Move Report
actions.description: Move a report to another enclave

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: Report ID

parameters.name: destination_enclave
parameters.description: ID of destination enclave

actions.name: Delete Report
actions.description: Delete a report

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: Report ID

parameters.name: id_type
parameters.description: ID type (Default: internal)

actions.name: Submit Report
actions.description: Submit report to TruSTAR

parameters.name: report_title
parameters.description: Report title

parameters.name: report_body
parameters.description: Text content of report

parameters.name: distribution_type
parameters.description: Distribution type

parameters.name: enclave_ids
parameters.description: (,) separated TruSTAR-generated enclave IDs

parameters.name: time_discovered
parameters.description: ISO-8601 formatted incident time with timezone (e.g. "2016-09-22T11:38:35+00:00")

parameters.name: external_tracking_id
parameters.description: External tracking ID (possibly a JIRA ticket number)

parameters.name: external_url
parameters.description: External URL (possibly a link to a JIRA ticket)

actions.name: Update Report
actions.description: Update a TruSTAR report

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: Report ID

parameters.name: id_type
parameters.description: ID type (Default: internal)

parameters.name: report_title
parameters.description: Report title

parameters.name: report_body
parameters.description: Text content of report

parameters.name: enclave_ids
parameters.description: (,) separated TruSTAR-generated enclave IDs

parameters.name: time_discovered
parameters.description: ISO-8601 formatted incident time with timezone (e.g. "2016-09-22T11:38:35+00:00")

parameters.name: external_tracking_id
parameters.description: External tracking ID (possibly a JIRA ticket number)

parameters.name: external_url
parameters.description: External URL (possibly a link to a JIRA ticket)

actions.name: Safelist Ioc
actions.description: Add IOCs to the whitelist

parameters.name: ioc
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of IOCs to add to the whitelist

actions.name: Unsafelist Ioc
actions.description: Remove IOC from the whitelist

parameters.name: ioc
parameters.description: IOC to remove from the whitelist

parameters.name: ioc_type
parameters.description: The type of the given IOC

actions.name: List Enclaves
actions.description: List all the accessible enclaves in TruSTAR

actions.name: List Emails
actions.description: Get a list of emails submitted to Phishing Triage

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: ISO-8601 formatted start time with timezone (e.g. "2021-06-01T11:38:35+00:00") within the last month

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: ISO-8601 formatted end time with timezone (e.g. "2021-06-23T17:24:42+00:00")

parameters.name: priority_event_score
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of priority scores to filter submissions by. Valid options: -1, 0, 1, 2, 3

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of statuses to filter submissions by. Valid options: CONFIRMED, IGNORED, UNRESOLVED

parameters.name: enclave_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of enclave IDs to filter submissions by

actions.name: List Indicators
actions.description: Get a list of indictors found in phishing submissions

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time in UTC (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time in UTC (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS)

parameters.name: indicator_score
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of indicator scores to filter indicators by

parameters.name: priority_event_score
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of priority scores to filter indicators by

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of statuses to filter indicators by

parameters.name: enclave_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of enclave IDs to filter indicators by

actions.name: Indicator Reputation
actions.description: Get enriched information of the indictor

parameters.name: indicator_value
parameters.description: The indicator value to search for

parameters.name: indicator_types
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of indicator types to filter indicators by

parameters.name: enclave_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of enclave IDs to filter indicators by

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specify the number of indicators to return (default value = 10000)

actions.name: Get Indicator Summary
actions.description: Get the structured summaries about indicators

parameters.name: indicator_values
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of indicator values to query

parameters.name: enclave_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of enclave IDs to filter indicators by

actions.name: Get Indicator Metadata
actions.description: Get the metadata associated with the indicator

parameters.name: indicator_types
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of indicator types

parameters.name: indicator_values
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of indicator values to query

parameters.name: enclave_ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of enclave IDs to filter indicators by

actions.name: Triage Email
actions.description: Change the status of an email submission

parameters.name: submission_id
parameters.description: ID of email submission to triage

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Status to set the email submission to

actions.name: Parse Entities
actions.description: Find all of the entity terms that can be found from applying extraction rules on a chunk of text

parameters.name: payload
parameters.description: Text using which all the entities will be extracted

actions.name: List Observable Types
actions.description: Get all valid observable types
